title: USDA Parser Diagnostics Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#diagnostics — format-neutral diagnostic codes (DuplicateSpecPath, InvalidFieldAlias, ForbiddenFieldOnSpecKind, TypeMismatch) and the canonical diagnostic shape are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract covers USDA-specific diagnostics (invalid header, unterminated tokens, unexpected token in production family) that reduce to format-neutral codes when surfaced through layer-open dispatch.

included: unterminated string, comment, path ref, and asset ref diagnostics
type mismatch diagnostics for known foundational types
unsupported grammar diagnostic when a production is intentionally deferred
deferred: error recovery after a hard parse failure
multi-diagnostic reporting for one invalid file
semantic diagnostics that require composition or value resolution

laws: duplicate spec path must halt processing
diagnostics must be target-native until serialized at adapter boundaries
diagnostics must use stable codes that goldens can match
unsupported composition semantics must not be reported merely because authored composition fields are present
a production marked included by these contracts must not be accepted as an unsupported-grammar diagnostic
reserved USDA keywords used outside their context-specific metadata productions must produce a parse diagnostic rather than extension metadata
golden_groups: unexpected token in each major production family
reserved metadata keywords rejected outside their grammar context
